description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and foregrip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The stock is fixed and extends straight back, providing stability and traditional ergonomics. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. The magazine is curved and protrudes downward, suggesting a detachable box type, commonly seen in semi-automatic or automatic rifles. Iron sights are present, with a front post and a rear notch, allowing for basic aiming. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a blend of wood and metal materials, suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, black metal receiver and barrel, curved detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, foregrip, black receiver, long barrel, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the end of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and trigger more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
